ItacPersonItem.Notes: Professor of philosophy in Rome and Bologna. A close friend of Achille Bocchi, he took part in the conversations of the Hermatena. See his biography by Antonio Rotondo`, in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
